improvements.change: Require implementors to define and validate an immutable deployment identifier strategy for any 'new version served' criterion before coding.
Explicitly require HTTP timeout settings for all workflow smoke-test network calls so retries cannot hang indefinitely.
Include a mandatory concurrency requirement for manually triggered promotion workflows to prevent overlapping slot swaps.
When acceptance criteria references production verification, require implementors to preserve or enforce a production-target validation path even if inputs are configurable.
Instruct implementors to prefer repository/environment vars for non-secret Azure identifiers and reserve secrets for secret material, while preserving backward compatibility where needed.
